titles.title: At the Cross At the Master's Feet

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: At the cross at the Master's feet, On my knees I've made my choice, I want to be His disciple, Close to Him, just through the faith. I'm A sheep inside His sheepfold, No one takes me from His hand, On the mountain or the valley, I had peaness misitified.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: At the cross at the Master's feet, On my knees I've made my choice, His disciple I want to be, Close to Him just through the faith.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: From that day I've made this great choice, There is joy inside my heart, Or the worries disappear, In Jesus of nowimern, I have said goodbye to His lostee, Of this word that tempted me, I have found the peace depromised, Through the blood of Calvary.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Soon my duty will be over, I will enter in that land, Where I find this gracious winner, Of the death and of this world, There are sing "Glory to His Name," To you who love me so much, For the great plan of redemption, As we deeply forever.
